meta-description: Learn about tax households by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Tax household
excerpt: The taxpayer(s) and any individuals who are claimed as dependents on one federal income tax return. A tax household may include a spouse and/or dependents.
content:
The taxpayer(s) and any individuals who are claimed as dependents on one federal income tax return. A tax household may include a spouse and/or dependents.
